inputs.shares_source: FY2025 diluted net income $219.134M / diluted EPS $1.22 (ALAB/investor-documents/sec-edgar/10-K_20260220_rpt20251231_acc0001736297_26_000010.htm)
inputs.fcf_source: Two-year average operating income proxy $144.745M ÷ 179.551M shares; FY2025 OCF $319.306M per ALAB/investor-documents/sec-edgar/10-K_20260220_rpt20251231_acc0001736297_26_000010.htm
inputs.normalization_note: FY2025 revenue grew 115% YoY; Lawrence base uses two-year average operating income, not peak net income inflated by valuation-allowance release.

bear.notes: Hyperscaler slowdown, customer concentration bite, multiple compression

base.notes: AI connectivity share gains; normalized owner cash; exit 10× owner cash

bull.notes: Design wins scale across PCIe Gen6/CXL and switch platforms

option_scan.question: GAAP book misstates core assets?
option_scan.evidence: Semiconductor inventory and IP at cost; no land-at-zero pattern (10-K)

option_scan.question: Undeveloped reserves / dormant assets?
option_scan.evidence: Fabless connectivity vendor; no royalty reserve pattern

option_scan.question: In-business loss segment?
option_scan.evidence: Single reportable segment profitable at operating line FY2025

option_scan.question: Backlog / contracted revenue not in FCF path?
option_scan.evidence: Design-win pipeline and product roadmap modeled in design_win_scale_option

option_scan.question: Private or illiquid stakes below fair value?
option_scan.evidence: No material equity-method stakes in FY2025 10-K

option_scan.question: Transitory distribution / legal recovery?
option_scan.evidence: No litigation recovery or special dividend catalyst

growth_explanation.mechanism: Revenue scales with AI data-center buildouts requiring high-speed PCIe, CXL, and Ethernet connectivity retimers and switches; design wins convert to unit shipments.

falsifiers.trigger: Customer A revenue share falls below 20% without replacement hyperscaler wins
Gross margin falls below 70% for four consecutive quarters

component_valuation.coverage_statement: Four additive components map AI connectivity owner cash, design-win scale option, net financial claims, and customer concentration reserve once each.

components.label: AI connectivity semiconductor operations (retimers, DSP, switches)

valuation.evidence: Primary bridge from ALAB/investor-documents/sec-edgar/10-K_20260220_rpt20251231_acc0001736297_26_000010.htm: FY2025 revenue $852.525M, operating income $173.423M, cash $167.611M, AFS $1021.205M, lease $30.974M; contract backfill 2026-07-21.
valuation.cross_check: Reconcile to FY2025 10-K and Q1 2026 10-Q before decision use.
valuation.falsifier: Primary evidence shows claim, cash conversion, or capital structure is materially worse than low case.

source.locator: FY2025 diluted net income $219.134M / diluted EPS $1.22

assumptions.label: Normalized owner cash per diluted share (two-year average operating income proxy)
assumptions.rationale: Two-year average operating income per share anchors AI connectivity semiconductor economics; FY2025 net income includes valuation-allowance release not repeated in base.

assumptions.label: Duration-adjusted owner-cash capitalization multiple
assumptions.rationale: Bear stresses hyperscaler concentration and semi cycle; base ten-year path on normalized owner cash; bull modest share gains without peak-cycle heroics.

calculations.label: AI connectivity semiconductor engine per share

valuation.falsifier: Primary evidence shows claim, cash conversion, or capital structure is materially worse than low case.

source.locator: FY2025 diluted net income $219.134M / diluted EPS $1.22

assumptions.rationale: Non-overlapping claim on PCIe/CXL/Ethernet retimer and switch roadmap adoption not fully captured in normalized owner-cash multiple; base is judgment band.

trigger.policy: A complete economic-value analysis is required when any trigger fires; otherwise it is recommended.

economic_claim.description: One diluted share of Astera Labs, including connectivity owner cash, design-win option, net financial claims, and concentration reserve.
economic_claim.unit_source: FY2025 diluted net income $219.134M / diluted EPS $1.22 (ALAB/investor-documents/sec-edgar/10-K_20260220_rpt20251231_acc0001736297_26_000010.htm)
economic_claim.enterprise_to_equity_reconciliation: Operating and option claims valued once; cash, securities, and reserves are separate components with unique overlap keys.

component_groups.label: AI connectivity semiconductor operations
component_groups.valuation_basis: Two-year average operating income capitalization proof.

component_groups.label: Design-win and product-scale option
component_groups.valuation_basis: Risk-adjusted milestone on AI infrastructure adoption.
component_groups.adjustments: Low case zero; base does not assume full roadmap NPV.

risk_and_timing.probability_basis: FY2025 revenue +115% YoY; base assumes partial roadmap conversion over three years without heroics.
risk_and_timing.timing_basis: Design wins ship as hyperscaler platforms ramp; [Assumption] 3-year base.
risk_and_timing.remaining_capital_basis: R&D embedded in normalized owner cash; no separate remaining-capital claim.

component_groups.economic_claim: Net cash, marketable securities, and lease claims

component_groups.adjustments: Low/high stress marks on securities portfolio.

component_groups.label: Hyperscaler customer concentration reserve
component_groups.valuation_basis: Negative reserve for Customer A 37% revenue and 73% AR concentration.

component_review_queue.decision_rule: Each assigned rater records accept, challenge, or reject with a proposed range and evidence. The aggregator may not silently average disputed ranges.

items.label: AI connectivity semiconductor operations (retimers, DSP, switches)
mandatory_checks: Is the valuation method appropriate for this economic claim?
Is the security's ownership claim and economic-unit denominator reconciled correctly?
Does the evidence support the low/base/high range and its timing?
Are comparable assets truly like-for-like after production, contract, location, capital, ownership, and realization adjustments?
For an option, are success probability, time to realization, and remaining owner-funded capital explicit?
Is the component additive, or already embedded in another component?
What observation would move the base estimate materially?

valuation_method_route.label: High-return compounder
failure_modes: growth projected without its capital cost
terminal value unsupported by a durable mechanism
valuation_method_route.decision_rule: Use one primary method and no more than two corroborating methods; irrelevant methods and personas remain silent.

method_route.label: High-return compounder
failure_modes: growth projected without its capital cost
terminal value unsupported by a durable mechanism
method_route.decision_rule: Use one primary method and no more than two corroborating methods; irrelevant methods and personas remain silent.

valuation.interpretation: value_per_share is withheld while any material additive component is unpriced; priced_components_per_share is not a complete security value.

scenario_contract.rule: Cases must change cited causal operating, capital, probability, timing, or financing drivers—not only a terminal multiple.

falsifiers: Primary evidence shows claim, cash conversion, or capital structure is materially worse than low case.

required_refresh_triggers: new filing or material operating update

change_control.rule: A source fact is locked. Every assumption change requires a reason, author, timestamp, and before/after value.

universal_valuation_contract.decision_rule: No security is decision-grade until every material claim is valued exactly once by a valid calculation proof and every material evidence blocker is resolved.

paths.label: Growth theory (pre-falsifier)
paths.weight_why: Segment blend before falsifier pass; diagnostic only when it differs from falsifier-adjusted.
weight_falsifiers: Included at full weight alongside falsifier-adjusted without divergence note

paths.label: Bear scenario (Lawrence)
paths.weight_why: Downside stress; low weight because bear is a sensitivity, not a competing explanation of base mechanics.
weight_falsifiers: Bear assumptions become base case in filings (e.g. sustained volume collapse)
paths.hard_to_vary: yes: asymmetric low weight is structural

paths.label: Bull scenario (Lawrence)
paths.weight_why: Upside stress probe; higher than bear because optionality archetype has skew, but still below primary paths.
weight_falsifiers: Bull growth sustained in filings for 4+ quarters without falsifier trigger

deutsch_checks.reach: Weights encode evidence tier (A primary → D external), not fitted to hit a target IRR

synthesis.notes: Capstone IRR combining filings, segments, overlays, third-party, qualitative
